blockingIssues.description: markPreviousDocumentsAsNotCurrent had incorrect WHERE clause - filtered by requirementKey only, missing requestId. Could incorrectly mark documents from OTHER service requests as not current.
blockingIssues.fixCommit: Blocking bug fixed in citizen-documents.service.ts: added requestId to WHERE clause using and(eq(...requestId), eq(...requirementKey))

blockingIssues.description: Same markPreviousDocumentsAsNotCurrent bug - missing requestId filter. Could affect documents from different requests sharing the same requirementKey.
blockingIssues.fixCommit: Same fix applied - both features share the same helper function

appliedUpdates.description: No changes needed - services.yaml already correctly documents frontend (port 3000), backend (port 3001), and maildev (port 1080)
No new knowledge entries - the blocking bug was a simple missing filter in an existing function, not a new pattern requiring documentation

rejectedObservations.observation: document-listing-api worker didn't update BACKEND_STATUS.md after adding replacesDocumentId field
rejectedObservations.reason: Change was minimal (adding one field to existing responses) and endpoints were already documented. Non-blocking.

sharedStateObservationsTriaged.triage: Fixed directly - added requestId to WHERE clause in citizen-documents.service.ts
